title: AhfuLife Extra Large Christmas Bags for Gift, 10PCS Reusable Christmas Tote Bags with Handles, Multipack Xmas Gift Bags Non-woven Christmas Treat Shopping Bags Xmas Party Favor, 40 x 36 x 15cm
features: 【Package Includes】: This pack contains a total of 10pcs Christmas gift bags. The size of Christmas Non-Woven Bags is 36*40*15cm. It has large room and is convenient to carry, meeting the needs of Christmas gift packaging and daily shopping.

【Practical Material】: Our Xmas bags is made of high-quality non-woven fabric, which is very practical. It is firm, waterproof and reusable. Our Christmas bags is a perfect substitute for paper bags, plastic bags and baskets.It is very suitable for Christmas party.

【High-Grade Design】: Each set of Christmas bags has a different design. The pattern of the Christmas Non-Woven bag is bright and colourful. Our Christmas treat bag is easy to open and fold, which is convenient for you to put things in and store them for next use.

【Best Christmas Gift】: Our Christmas gift bags has a large capacity, which can be used to put Christmas snacks, doll bunny and other gifts, and make Christmas gift bags for children and your friends. Can hold many Christmas gifts. It is easy to carry. An Christmas tote bag is an ideal gift packaging bag.

【Supply for Christmas Party】: Our Christmas tote bags with Handles is the best choice for Christmas party, Christmas gift packaging, and party decoration. It can also be used as a daily shopping bag and storage bag.
description: Product Description AhfuLife Extra Large Christmas Gift Bags for Xmas Party Decorations AhfuLife Christmas bags will be a perfect containers for you, as they are large enough to hold the gifts which you have been carefully prepared for your beloved families, friends, relatives and so on. Perfect Christmas Gift Bags AhfuLife Christmas bags will be a perfect containers for you, as they are large enough to hold the gifts which you have been carefully prepared for your beloved families, friends, relatives and so on. Wonderful Shopping Bags With Santa Claus, reindeer, snowflakes and other various Christmas elements printed on the non-woven gift bags, AufuLife Christmas gift bags, which bring your strong festival atmosphere, can also be your lovely festival shopping helper gift-giving partner. Design Features of the Non-Woven Bags Previous page Thoughful Design Discarding the design disadvantages of traditional non-woven bags, our christmas gift bags will give you a better experience of gift-giving. Various Design Styles All the rich colors and patterns printing of our bags are relevant with Christmas, they will be nice atmosphere-creators for you to spend an unforgettable Christmas.
